Flow.description: Portal Screen flow for inputting the allocation of spend to different financial years when the batch spans multiple financial years

formulas.name: flaDoDatesSpanFinancialYear
formulas.expression: IF( OR( AND( {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_start_date} <= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, 3, 31), {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_completion_date} >= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, 3, 31) ), AND( {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_start_date} <= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 2, 3, 31), {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_completion_date} >= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 2, 3, 31) ), AND( {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_start_date} <= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 3, 3, 31), {!What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_completion_date} >= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 3, 3, 31) ) ), TRUE, FALSE )

Flow.interviewLabel: ABS FORM - Batch Spans Finanicial Year {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: ABS FORM - Batch Spans Finanicial Year

fields.name: BatchDeliveryCreationScreenTitle1
fields.fieldText: Batch Financial Year Estimate

fields.name: BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: BatchDeliveryCreationScreenDescription
fields.fieldText: It appears this batch will not be completed within the same financial year it starts, please provide either an estimate of how much funding would be used in the current year or a percentage of the funding that will be used in the current year.

fields.name: What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_start_date
fields.fieldText: What is the estimated batch delivery start date?

fields.name: What_is_the_estimated_batch_delivery_completion_date
fields.fieldText: What is the estimated batch delivery completion date?

fields.name: Batch_Delivery_Completion_DisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Total Grant Requested

{!varTotalFundsRequested}

fields.name: estimateDescription
fields.fieldText: How much funding will be spent in FY{!Batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Time_Period_Sequence__c} for this batch?

fields.name: spendFYTitle
fields.fieldText: How much funding will be spent in FY{!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Time_Period_Sequence__c} for this batch?

fields.name: FundingAllocationError
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The amount allocated to the FYs above exceeds the Total Grant Requested amount

fields.name: remainingFY2Title
fields.fieldText: The amount of funding left to be spent in FY{!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Time_Period_Sequence__c}

fields.name: thirdFYTitle
fields.fieldText: The amount of funding left to be spent in FY{!Batch.FY3_Baseline__r.Time_Period_Sequence__c}
